positive: A symmetrical, neo-geometric crest featuring a stylized roaring lion flanking a majestic celestial sphere. The sphere contains abstract, flowing constellations rendered in brilliant sapphire and gold ink, contrasted against a deep indigo background. Utilize bold, thick line art and stylized, interconnected angular motifs that evoke ancient heraldry and modern tribal tattoo design. The overall composition must be designed for maximum contrast and readability on fabric. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette of deep indigo, metallic gold, sapphire blue, and crisp white. High contrast, flat illustration style, minimalist detail, sticker quality, vector graphic aesthetic. Centered composition, full bleed, highly detailed, perfect for apparel transfer print.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, noise, grayscale, fuzzy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, realistic photo, depth of field
